# Third-Party Licenses

NexUSB bundles the following third-party tools, unmodified, from the
Ubuntu/Debian archive. Each keeps its own license. The tool name links
directly to its authoritative upstream license file (`LICENSE`, `LICENSE.md`,
`LICENSE.txt`, `COPYING`, or `LICENCE`, whichever the project actually uses).
A few projects publish no discrete license file; those link to the canonical
text of the license they are released under. No license text is copied here.

Proprietary tools (TeamViewer, AnyDesk, NoMachine, etc.) are intentionally
excluded — they are never bundled.

## Minimal build

- [ClamAV](https://github.com/Cisco-Talos/clamav/blob/main/COPYING.txt) - GPL-2.0
- [chkrootkit](https://www.chkrootkit.org/) - BSD-2-Clause
- [TestDisk / PhotoRec](https://github.com/cgsecurity/testdisk/blob/master/COPYING) - GPL-2.0-or-later
- [GNU ddrescue](https://www.gnu.org/software/ddrescue/) - GPL-3.0-or-later
- [GParted](https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/gparted/-/blob/master/COPYING) - GPL-2.0-or-later
- [util-linux (fdisk)](https://github.com/util-linux/util-linux/blob/master/COPYING) - GPL-2.0-or-later (mixed)
- [GNU parted](https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0.html) - GPL-3.0-or-later
- [smartmontools](https://github.com/smartmontools/smartmontools/blob/main/COPYING) - GPL-2.0-or-later
- [Nmap](https://github.com/nmap/nmap/blob/master/LICENSE) - Nmap Public Source License (NPSL)
- [netcat (OpenBSD)](https://spdx.org/licenses/BSD-3-Clause.html) - BSD-3-Clause
- [tcpdump / libpcap](https://github.com/the-tcpdump-group/tcpdump/blob/master/LICENSE) - BSD-3-Clause
- [OpenSSH](https://github.com/openssh/openssh-portable/blob/master/LICENCE) - BSD-style (OpenSSH)
- [Remmina](https://gitlab.com/Remmina/Remmina/-/blob/master/LICENSE) - GPL-2.0-or-later
- [TigerVNC](https://github.com/TigerVNC/tigervnc/blob/master/LICENCE.TXT) - GPL-2.0
- [xrdp](https://github.com/neutrinolabs/xrdp/blob/master/COPYING) - Apache-2.0
- [Openbox](https://github.com/danakj/openbox/blob/master/COPYING) - GPL-2.0
- [LXDM](https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0.html) - GPL-3.0
- [LXTerminal](https://github.com/lxde/lxterminal/blob/master/COPYING) - GPL-2.0-or-later
- [PCManFM](https://github.com/lxde/pcmanfm/blob/master/COPYING) - GPL-2.0-or-later
- [Mozilla Firefox](https://www.mozilla.org/en-US/MPL/2.0/) - MPL-2.0
- [GNU Midnight Commander](https://github.com/MidnightCommander/mc/blob/master/COPYING) - GPL-3.0
- [GNU nano](https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0.html) - GPL-3.0-or-later
- [htop](https://github.com/htop-dev/htop/blob/main/COPYING) - GPL-2.0-or-later
- [Vim](https://github.com/vim/vim/blob/master/LICENSE) - Vim License (charityware, GPL-compatible)
- [PyGObject (python3-gi)](https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/pygobject/-/blob/master/COPYING) - LGPL-2.1-or-later
- [GTK 3](https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/gtk/-/blob/main/COPYING) - LGPL-2.1-or-later
- [NetworkManager](https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/NetworkManager/NetworkManager/-/blob/main/COPYING) - GPL-2.0-or-later
- [dialog](https://invisible-island.net/dialog/) - LGPL-2.1
- [Papirus icon theme](https://github.com/PapirusDevelopmentTeam/papirus-icon-theme/blob/master/LICENSE) - GPL-3.0
- [DejaVu fonts](https://github.com/dejavu-fonts/dejavu-fonts/blob/master/LICENSE) - Bitstream Vera (+ public domain)
- [Liberation fonts](https://github.com/liberationfonts/liberation-fonts/blob/main/LICENSE) - SIL OFL-1.1
- [ImageMagick](https://github.com/ImageMagick/ImageMagick/blob/main/LICENSE) - ImageMagick License (Apache-2.0-style)
- [GNU Wget](https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0.html) - GPL-3.0-or-later

## Full build (additional)

- [rkhunter](https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-2.0.html) - GPL-2.0-or-later
- [Lynis](https://github.com/CISOfy/lynis/blob/master/LICENSE) - GPL-3.0
- [AIDE](https://github.com/aide/aide/blob/master/COPYING) - GPL-2.0-or-later
- [Fail2ban](https://github.com/fail2ban/fail2ban/blob/master/COPYING) - GPL-2.0-or-later
- [Nikto](https://github.com/sullo/nikto/blob/main/COPYING) - GPL-2.0
- [John the Ripper](https://github.com/openwall/john/blob/master/LICENSE) - GPL-2.0-or-later
- [hashcat](https://github.com/hashcat/hashcat/blob/master/docs/license.txt) - MIT
- [Aircrack-ng](https://github.com/aircrack-ng/aircrack-ng/blob/master/LICENSE) - GPL-2.0-or-later
- [OWASP ZAP](https://github.com/zaproxy/zaproxy/blob/main/LICENSE) - Apache-2.0
- [The Sleuth Kit](https://www.sleuthkit.org/sleuthkit/licenses.php) - IPL/CPL + GPL-2.0 + BSD
- [Scalpel](https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-2.0.html) - GPL-2.0
- [Clonezilla](https://github.com/stevenshiau/clonezilla/blob/master/LICENSE) - GPL-2.0-or-later
- [Partclone](https://github.com/Thomas-Tsai/partclone/blob/master/COPYING) - GPL-2.0
- [nvme-cli](https://github.com/linux-nvme/nvme-cli/blob/master/LICENSE) - GPL-2.0-or-later
- [GNOME Disks](https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/gnome-disk-utility/-/blob/master/COPYING) - GPL-2.0-or-later
- [baobab (Disk Usage)](https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/baobab/-/blob/master/COPYING) - GPL-2.0-or-later
- [duf](https://github.com/muesli/duf/blob/master/LICENSE) - MIT
- [Wireshark](https://github.com/wireshark/wireshark/blob/master/COPYING) - GPL-2.0-or-later
- [nethogs](https://github.com/raboof/nethogs/blob/main/COPYING) - GPL-2.0-or-later
- [iperf3](https://github.com/esnet/iperf/blob/master/LICENSE) - BSD-3-Clause
- [mtr](https://github.com/traviscross/mtr/blob/master/COPYING) - GPL-2.0
- [wavemon](https://github.com/uoaerg/wavemon/blob/master/LICENSE) - GPL-3.0
- [kismet](https://github.com/kismetwireless/kismet/blob/master/LICENSE) - GPL-2.0
- [Binwalk](https://github.com/ReFirmLabs/binwalk/blob/master/LICENSE) - MIT
- [bulk_extractor](https://github.com/simsong/bulk_extractor/blob/main/LICENSE.md) - MIT
- [Volatility 3](https://github.com/volatilityfoundation/volatility3/blob/master/LICENSE.txt) - Volatility Software License
- [Thunar](https://gitlab.xfce.org/xfce/thunar/-/blob/master/COPYING) - GPL-2.0-or-later
- [Nautilus](https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/nautilus/-/blob/main/COPYING) - GPL-3.0-or-later
- [ranger](https://github.com/ranger/ranger/blob/master/LICENSE) - GPL-3.0
- [nnn](https://github.com/jarun/nnn/blob/master/LICENSE) - BSD-2-Clause
- [w3m](https://github.com/tats/w3m/blob/master/COPYING) - MIT
- [Evince](https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/evince/-/blob/main/COPYING) - GPL-2.0-or-later
- [VSCodium](https://github.com/VSCodium/vscodium/blob/master/LICENSE) - MIT
- [tmux](https://github.com/tmux/tmux/blob/master/COPYING) - ISC
- [btop](https://github.com/aristocratos/btop/blob/main/LICENSE) - Apache-2.0
- [Glances](https://github.com/nicolargo/glances/blob/master/COPYING) - LGPL-3.0
- [fish](https://github.com/fish-shell/fish-shell/blob/master/COPYING) - GPL-2.0
- [rsync](https://github.com/WayneD/rsync/blob/master/COPYING) - GPL-3.0-or-later
- [Timeshift](https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0.html) - GPL-3.0
- [BorgBackup](https://github.com/borgbackup/borg/blob/master/LICENSE) - BSD-3-Clause
- [restic](https://github.com/restic/restic/blob/master/LICENSE) - BSD-2-Clause
- [rclone](https://github.com/rclone/rclone/blob/master/COPYING) - MIT
- [QEMU](https://github.com/qemu/qemu/blob/master/LICENSE) - GPL-2.0
- [Wine](https://github.com/wine-mirror/wine/blob/master/LICENSE) - LGPL-2.1-or-later
- [git](https://github.com/git/git/blob/master/COPYING) - GPL-2.0
- [SQLite](https://github.com/sqlite/sqlite/blob/master/LICENSE.md) - Public Domain
- [VLC](https://github.com/videolan/vlc/blob/master/COPYING) - GPL-2.0-or-later
- [mpv](https://github.com/mpv-player/mpv/blob/master/LICENSE.GPL) - GPL-2.0-or-later / LGPL-2.1
- [FFmpeg](https://github.com/FFmpeg/FFmpeg/blob/master/LICENSE.md) - LGPL-2.1-or-later / GPL
- [GIMP](https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/gimp/-/blob/master/COPYING) - GPL-3.0-or-later
- [Inkscape](https://gitlab.com/inkscape/inkscape/-/blob/master/COPYING) - GPL-2.0 / GPL-3.0
- [Audacity](https://github.com/audacity/audacity/blob/master/LICENSE.txt) - GPL-2.0-or-later
- [x11vnc](https://github.com/LibVNC/x11vnc/blob/master/COPYING) - GPL-2.0-or-later
- [xz-utils](https://github.com/tukaani-project/xz/blob/master/COPYING) - public domain / 0BSD
- [RustDesk](https://github.com/rustdesk/rustdesk/blob/master/LICENCE) - AGPL-3.0
